title: SearchResults
description: The result of a JQL search.

expand.description: Expand options that include additional search result details in the response.

issues.description: The list of issues found by the search.

maxResults.description: The maximum number of results that could be on the page.

names.description: The ID and name of each field in the search results.

schema.description: The schema describing the field types in the search results.

startAt.description: The index of the first item returned on the page.

total.description: The number of results on the page.

warningMessages.description: Any warnings related to the JQL query.
